description:

my second uploaded bot (YIPEE) （╹◡╹）

As said before, feel free to leave constructive criticism (not hate)

TIPS:

Usually bots tend to speak for you, and it’s because your responses might lack enough to work off of (use three sentences at least)

If a bot always misgenders you, use a third person perspective to battle this (especially when talking to the same gender)
